expectations.text: Uses exchange_calendars regular_holidays API (not a manual list or holidays pip package)
expectations.evidence: Lines 91-94: calendar.regular_holidays.holidays() + adhoc_holidays. Primary mechanism is exchange_calendars.

expectations.text: References correct MIC codes: XNYS for NYSE and XLON for LSE
Shows the major_holiday = both NYSE AND LSE closed pattern
Holiday detection excludes weekends (only counts official exchange closures)
expectations.evidence: Lines 86-87 docstring: 'Weekend dates are excluded — these sets contain only dates that WOULD be trading days but are closed.' Lines 150-153: explicit note about weekend exclusion.
